_meta.author: xubohuah
_meta.title: NeonRGBTextEffect
_meta.description: A neon text effect component featuring RGB channel splitting, inspired by TikTok's signature glitch aesthetic. Unlike TikTok's dynamic, bouncing RGB separation, this implementation opts for a more subtle and elegant static approach. Using WebGL shaders, it splits the text into red, green, and blue channels with slight horizontal offsets, creating a sophisticated neon glow effect through additive blending. The result is a modern, minimalist take on the glitch effect that maintains visual clarity while adding a touch of digital sophistication.
